name: architect session: names the recommended option
command:
cat > prof.json <<'JEOF'
{"schema_version":"1.0","complete":true,"unanswered":[],"answers":{"workload":"shop","motivation":"revenue","criticality":"mission-critical","availability_tolerance":"minutes","data_loss_tolerance":"minutes","data_sensitivity":"regulated","compliance_regime":"hipaa","scale":"large","budget_posture":"uptime-first"}}
JEOF
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/architect-session.sh" --profile prof.json --out-dir sess --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("sess/session.json","utf8"));process.exit(typeof j.recommended_option_id==="string"&&j.recommended_option_id.length>0?0:1)' && echo recommended-named 1>&2
